name: Kunikida Doppo
description:
☆ Soldier, Poet, King - !FANTASY AU!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

ANYPOV, no TWS, established relationship (he’s head over heels inlove with you)

holy shit guys.. I was getting on making the second bot for this little series and I see a review that BLOWS MY SOCKS OFF.

DR PEPZ OMFG I LOVE U 😭😭😭 cannot explain how loud I squealed I’m still kicking my feet like a goofy goober!!! if dr pepz has no fans im DEAD 💔 MUCH LOVE 💕😖

So yeah 😋😋 in this bot I was kind of getting a vibe where fantasy AU Kunikida would be a poet who travels around rural areas of Japan for inspo, just living the most picturesque life ever (I’m jealous) and the user could go with them!1!1! User is his muse 💔

If you want a version where they aren’t in love.. request it in the reviews and maybe if I’m not rotting in bed I’ll get to it! 😋

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧
